Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $21,471,047Details

Worldwide Box Office $27,519,694

Total $22,321,212

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 23rd, 2007 (Wide) by New Line
Video Release: July 10th, 2007 by New Line Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for some thematic elements, mild peril and language.
Running Time: 94 minutes
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Environment, FBI, Time Travel, Workaholic
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
